title: We Build
subtitle: The Future of Commerce.
description: MNMKNK is an Egyptian platform to discover the best shops and restaurants near you with offers, ratings, and a simple, fast user experience.
visionText: To enable every shop in Egypt to own a world-class digital storefront and smart management system in minutes, without technical complexity.
techText: We use the latest AI technologies (Gemini) to guarantee real offers and a personalized shopping experience for every user.
betaText: MNMKNK platform is currently in Beta Test phase. This means some features may not work at their best, and we're working around the clock to improve the experience. Your feedback and suggestions are the fuel that drives us to be the best version always.
